hero.headline: Make Home Look Alive.
hero.lede: Kevin uses Swiss-engineered light, shadow, and everyday sound to make your home feel occupied before anyone tests the door.
hero.away_body: Light, shadow, and sound vary automatically.
hero.privacy_body: Simulation plays locally on the device.

problem.heading: Empty is an invitation.
problem.subheading: Most security products react after the risk has already started. Kevin is built for the moment before: when a home, flat, or office needs to look lived-in from the outside.
problem.tile_1_body: A siren starts after entry. Kevin adds visible presence beforehand, so your place looks like the harder target.
problem.tile_2_body: Footage can help later, but it does not make a quiet room feel occupied. Burglars still count on speed and distance.
problem.tile_3_body: Timers switch lamps on and off. Kevin creates changing shadows, TV-like flicker, and household sounds that feel more natural.

solution.heading: Deterrence that feels human.
solution.subheading: Place Kevin near a wall or ceiling it can use like a stage. From outside, light, shadows, and sound suggest everyday life—not only burglary deterrence, but a home that feels occupied when you travel, work late, or live alone.
solution.pillar_1_body: Bright, warm scenes make a room look lived-in instead of simply lit. Kevin varies the rhythm for mornings, evenings, and nights.
solution.pillar_2_body: Projected silhouettes show families at dinner, someone reading, or quiet company—so the room reads as active, not empty.
solution.pillar_3_body: Kitchen noise, TV ambience, footsteps, voices, and your own recordings help the simulation feel personal and less repetitive.
solution.image_alt: Kevin device with window silhouettes of families, reading, and everyday home life

steps.heading: Plug in. Set routines. Leave calmly.
steps.subheading: No installation, no wiring, no monthly monitoring panel. Kevin starts with a simple setup and grows more useful through schedules, geofencing, and updates.
steps.step_1_body: Set it near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect power and let the room become the stage.
steps.step_2_body: Use the app for weekly schedules, holiday mode, or geo-aware activation when you leave the area.
steps.step_3_body: Kevin plays varied light and sound scenarios from local storage, so your routines are not streamed from the cloud or shared with third parties.

app.heading: Presence on your schedule.
app.subheading: Turn Kevin on, plan weekly routines, and manage multiple devices from one simple app built for peace of mind.
app.phone_6_caption: Kevin — activation, scheduling, and simulation controls
app.phone_1_caption: Simulation — tune volume, night mode, and characteristics
app.phone_2_caption: Schedule — set protection by day and hour
app.phone_3_caption: Device — rename, customize, and manage firmware
app.phone_4_caption: Auto-activation — enable location when you leave
app.phone_5_caption: Location — set where Kevin activates automatically
app.tile_1_body: Plan mornings, evenings, nights, weekends, and holidays so your home follows a believable rhythm while you are away.
app.tile_2_body: Kevin can start when you leave the area, while still letting you trigger a simulation manually for quick errands.
app.tile_3_body: Upload recordings and tag them by room or activity so the simulation can sound more like your household.
app.tile_4_body: Use more than one Kevin for apartments, extra floors, offices, or second homes that should not feel abandoned.

personas.heading: A smarter layer for real life.
personas.subheading: Whether you travel, live alone, commute, or already own an alarm, Kevin adds the missing signal: everyday life appears to be happening inside.
personas.persona_1_body: Weekend away or long holiday, Kevin keeps the room active with varied scenes instead of a fixed light timer.
personas.persona_1_quote: "I wanted the house to feel occupied, not just illuminated. Kevin gives me that."
personas.persona_2_body: Keep it. Kevin complements detection with deterrence, helping your home look occupied before anyone considers entry.
personas.persona_2_quote: "Our alarm tells us if something happens. Kevin helps make the house look like the wrong target."
personas.persona_3_body: Students, young professionals, or anyone home by themselves can run believable scenes—so from the hallway or street it looks like everyday life is happening inside.
personas.persona_3_quote: "I wanted my flat to feel active, not just lit. Kevin makes it look like someone is home—even when I am there alone."

proof.heading: Realistic where it matters: from outside.
proof.quote_1: "From the pavement, the light and movement make the room feel occupied. That is exactly what I wanted."
proof.quote_2: "A friend thought someone was inside and rang the bell. Kevin did its job before anyone reached the door."
proof.quote_3: "The shadow effects are the part people notice. From the stairwell, the apartment does not feel empty."
proof.summary_eyebrow: Why it converts hesitation into confidence
proof.summary_body: Kevin is simple to place, private by design, and most convincing from the exact perspective that matters: outside the home.

pricing.heading: Choose your security layer.
pricing.subheading: Own Kevin outright or subscribe monthly. Either way, you get a privacy-first presence simulator built to deter before an alarm is needed.

llms_page.short_points_to_full: Each short llms.txt file links to its matching llms-full.txt for complete brand and product context.
llms_page.oneliner: When you are away, Kevin uses Swiss AI to simulate real human presence with light, shadow, and sound—so your home stays visibly lived-in and burglars move on.
llms_page.buy_bullet: **Kevin (Buy)**: One-time purchase. Device with 70+ hours of believable AI presence, Kevin App control, free delivery in Europe, 3-year Swiss warranty.
llms_page.sub_bullet: **Kevin+ (Subscribe)**: Monthly plan with device included, premium AI library, hardware replacement, cancel anytime.
llms_page.how_2: Set a schedule or let Kevin activate when you leave.
llms_page.how_3: Your home never looks empty—light, shadow, and sound adapt over time.
llms_page.diff_1: Prevention, not reaction (vs alarms that trigger after entry)
llms_page.diff_4: Qualitative daytime burglary risk positioning (no unsourced police statistics)
llms_page.character: Character: Homeowners in Switzerland/Europe who want peace of mind when away.
llms_page.lede: Swiss AI presence simulation for your home. When you are away, Kevin uses light, shadow, and sound so your home looks and sounds lived-in—and burglars move on.

faq.a1: Kevin is Swiss AI presence simulation for your home. It uses light, shadow, and sound to make your home look and sound lived-in when you are away.
faq.q2: How is Kevin different from alarms and cameras?
faq.a2: Alarms react after entry. Cameras record evidence but rarely deter in the moment. Kevin focuses on prevention so your home never looks empty from the street.
faq.q3: Does Kevin use cameras or microphones?
faq.a3: No. Kevin simulates presence with light, shadow, and sound only. No cameras and no microphones in your home. Simulations are stored locally on the device, not streamed from the cloud or shared with third parties.
faq.a4: Choose your color and plan on the configure page, then continue to secure Shopify checkout with free delivery across Europe and a 3-year Swiss warranty.
